properties.description: Daily ESR Actives ETL: reads all StaffInPost_*.csv, PositionsAnalysis_*.csv and Learning_*.csv from p_source_folder; runs df_transform_esr_actives (3-source join); writes Active Staff Full (V0.1) and Patient Privacy Workforce (V0.2) as all-VPD and VPD-filtered outputs; archives source files. Output filenames: YYYYMMDD_ActiveStaffFull_Azure.csv and YYYYMMDD_PatientPrivacyWorkforce_Azure.csv.
Loads Active Staff + Vacancy Data Mart from conformed ActiveStaffFull CSV.

text.value: DELETE FROM dbo.Fact_ActiveStaff WHERE SnapshotDateKey = @{pipeline().parameters.p_snapshot_date_key}; DELETE FROM dbo.Fact_Vacancy WHERE SnapshotDateKey = @{pipeline().parameters.p_snapshot_date_key};

properties.description: Source for pl_load_datamart. Reads the conformed ActiveStaffFull CSV produced by pl_esr_actives_daily. p_folder = conformed sub-path (e.g. actives/staff/all); p_filename = YYYYMMDD_ActiveStaffFull_Azure_All.csv.
Generic folder-scoped dataset in conformed container. p_folder drives the path; no filename. Shared by all ClearWorking/CleanWorking Delete and CopyRename source activities.
Archive dataset — folder-level sink (no filename). Wildcard copy writes each source file to this folder with its original name preserved. Shared by all three archive copy activities (SIP, POS, LRN).

ESR Actives source 3 of 3: Learning CSV. All files matching Learning_*.csv in p_folder are read (wildcard). Training records aggregated by Applicant Number (one row per employee: latest course, date, status, score) before LEFT-joining to StaffInPost on Employee Number = Applicant Number.

ESR Actives source 2 of 3: PositionsAnalysis CSV. All files matching PositionsAnalysis_*.csv in p_folder are read (wildcard). Position metadata: job title, staff group, occupation code, hiring status and org hierarchy (Org L3-L6). LEFT-joined to StaffInPost on Position Number = Position.

Output 2a: Patient Privacy Workforce — all-VPD consolidated CSV. Schema per Active Patient Privacy Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.2 (subset of Active Staff Full; no Prof Reg/DBS/Visa fields). Path: conformed/actives/pp/all/.
Output 2b: Patient Privacy Workforce — single VPD filtered CSV. Schema per Active Patient Privacy Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.2. Path: conformed/actives/pp/<vpd_code>/.

ESR Actives source 1 of 3: StaffInPost CSV. All files matching StaffInPost_*.csv in p_folder are read (wildcard) — supports any number of per-VPD files. Payroll Name first 3 chars is used to derive TRUST_VPD.
Output 1a: Active Staff Full — all-VPD consolidated CSV. Schema per Active Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.1. Path: conformed/actives/staff/all/.
Output 1b: Active Staff Full — single VPD filtered CSV. Schema per Active Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.1. Path: conformed/actives/staff/<vpd_code>/.
Daily schedule trigger for pl_esr_actives_daily. Fires at 01:00 UTC (1:00am GMT). Created in STOPPED state — activate manually after testing is complete.

Loads Dim_Assignment from conformed CSV. Left-joins Dim_Organisation on WORKPLACE_ORG_NAME = CostCentre and Dim_Person on PUID to resolve OrgKey and PersonKey. Upserts on AssignmentNumber. FullTimePartTime derived from FTE.

sources.name: SourceDimOrg
sources.description: Dim_Organisation lookup — reads OrgKey, CostCentre from SQL.

sources.name: SourceDimPerson
sources.description: Dim_Person lookup — reads PersonKey, PUID from SQL.

properties.description: Loads Dim_Organisation, Dim_Person and Dim_Position from conformed ActiveStaffFull CSV. Upserts on natural keys. CostCentre = WORKPLACE_ORG_NAME (temp key). Org L2-L5 = NULL until conformed CSV is extended.

sources.name: SourceConformed
sources.description: Conformed ActiveStaffFull CSV — output of pl_esr_actives_daily.

sinks.name: SinkDimPerson
sinks.description: Upsert Dim_Person on PUID key (SCD Type 1 — overwrite on re-load).

properties.description: Loads Fact_ActiveStaff and Fact_Vacancy. Sources all dim tables from SQL to resolve surrogate FKs. Filters out rows with null mandatory FKs. SnapshotDateKey injected via pipeline parameter p_snapshot_date_key.

sources.name: SourceDimOrg
sources.description: Dim_Organisation — OrgKey + CostCentre for FK lookup.

sources.name: SourceDimPerson
sources.description: Dim_Person — PersonKey + PUID for FK lookup.

sources.name: SourceDimPosition
sources.description: Dim_Position — PositionKey + PositionNumber for FK lookup.

sources.name: SourceDimAssignment
sources.description: Dim_Assignment — AssignmentKey + AssignmentNumber for FK lookup.

sources.name: SourceDimEmpType
sources.description: Dim_EmploymentType — EmploymentTypeKey + EmploymentTypeCode for FK lookup.

sinks.name: SinkFactVacancy
sinks.description: Upsert Fact_Vacancy on (SnapshotDateKey, PositionKey). BudgetedWTE left null (placeholder).

properties.description: Three-source join: StaffInPost + PositionsAnalysis (LEFT on Position Number = Position) + Learning aggregated (LEFT on Employee Number = Applicant Number). TRUST_VPD derived from file name. Dual output branches: SelectActiveStaff (full spec V0.1) and SelectPatientPrivacy (subset spec V0.2). VPD filter is LAST on each branch.

sources.name: SourceSIP
sources.description: StaffInPost CSV: person, assignment, supervisor and employment data. Payroll Name first 3 chars used to derive TRUST_VPD. Multi-VPD file — rows for all trusts in the upload.

sources.name: SourcePOS
sources.description: PositionsAnalysis CSV: position metadata. LEFT-joined to SourceSIP on {Position Number} = Position. Provides formal job title, staff group, occupation code, hiring status and org hierarchy.

sources.name: SourceLRN
sources.description: Learning CSV: training and e-learning records. Aggregated to one row per employee before joining to prevent row duplication.

sinks.name: SinkStaffAll
sinks.description: Write Active Staff Full all-VPD CSV to conformed/actives/staff/all/. No filter — every employee row from every trust. Schema: Active Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.1.

sinks.name: SinkStaffVPD
sinks.description: Write Active Staff Full VPD-filtered CSV to conformed/actives/staff/<vpd_code>/. Schema: Active Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.1.

sinks.name: SinkPPAll
sinks.description: Write Patient Privacy Workforce all-VPD CSV to conformed/actives/pp/all/. No filter — every employee row from every trust. Schema: Active Patient Privacy Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.2.

sinks.name: SinkPPVPD
sinks.description: Write Patient Privacy Workforce VPD-filtered CSV to conformed/actives/pp/<vpd_code>/. Schema: Active Patient Privacy Staff Data Product Mapping Spec V0.2.

transformations.name: AggregateLRN
transformations.description: Aggregate Learning records by Applicant Number. Takes last() of Course, Completion Date, Enrollment Status and Score — one row per employee for the join.

transformations.name: JoinSIPPOS
transformations.description: LEFT JOIN: StaffInPost joined to PositionsAnalysis on {Position Number} = Position. All SIP rows retained. Position columns are null if no matching position exists.

transformations.name: JoinAll
transformations.description: LEFT JOIN: JoinSIPPOS result joined to AggregateLRN on {Employee Number} = {Applicant Number}. All employee rows retained. Learning columns are null for employees with no training records.

transformations.name: DeriveFields
transformations.description: Attribute conformance: PUID from ESR source column, FORENAME/SURNAME preserved as-is from ESR (not upper-cased), DATE_OF_BIRTH reformat, FTE to 2dp, OCCUPATION_CODE 3-digit 0-pad, TRUST_VPD from Payroll Name first 3 chars, DATE_LEFT_JOB_ESR and DATE_STARTED_IN_JOB_ESR from Asg Effective dates. Null placeholders for future/no-source fields.

transformations.name: SelectActiveStaff
transformations.description: Branch 1: maps derived fields to Active Staff Full output schema per Mapping Spec V0.1. DATE_LEFT_JOB is blank. Includes Prof Reg/DBS/Visa fields (all null/orange). Learning columns excluded.

transformations.name: SelectPatientPrivacy
transformations.description: Branch 2: maps derived fields to Patient Privacy Workforce output schema per Mapping Spec V0.2 (subset of V0.1). DATE_LEFT_JOB from Asg Effective End Date. Prof Reg/DBS/Visa columns excluded entirely.

transformations.name: FilterVPDStaff
transformations.description: VPD filter for Active Staff Full branch. Applied AFTER SinkStaffAll so all-VPD output is fully written first.

transformations.name: FilterVPDPP
transformations.description: VPD filter for Patient Privacy Workforce branch. Applied AFTER SinkPPAll so all-VPD output is fully written first.

scriptLines: isNull({Date of Birth}) || length(trim({Date of Birth})) == 0,
isNull({Latest Start Date}) || length(trim({Latest Start Date})) == 0,
isNull({Asg Effective End Date}) || length(trim({Asg Effective End Date})) == 0,
isNull({Asg Effective Start Date}) || length(trim({Asg Effective Start Date})) == 0,
isNull({NHS Entry Date}) || length(trim({NHS Entry Date})) == 0,
